name: 反擊型（以退為進式打臉）
description: 女主面對侮辱時不直接暴怒，而是用輕描淡寫的語氣拋出重磅信息，讓對方自取其辱。這種「不屑於解釋」的態度比怒吼更有殺傷力。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I'm sorry, but if you kick me out, I'm afraid we'd have to cancel the whole event. / Yeah, I did know that because I asked him to.
